---
applyTo: "keiki/**"
---

Keiki brand rules:
- Voice is soft luxury, feminine, polished, warm, intentional.
- Never sound corporate.
- Keep copy elegant, inviting, and personal.
- Prioritize website copy, social captions, travel notices, inquiry funnels, and creator branding.
- Default goals: get attention, build desire, drive inquiries, keep tone refined.
- When writing social content, make it concise and attractive.
- When writing site content, keep it clean and easy to skim.
